name: JADE
notes: One of the HPCQS quantum simulators; neutral atoms/Rydberg atoms.

name: Ruby
notes: Second HPCQS quantum simulator located at TGCC/CEA area.

name: Lucy
notes: Photonic LOQC platform; listed by EuroHPC among accessible systems.

name: Piast-Q
notes: Trapped-ion system with long coherence times and all-to-all connectivity.

name: Euro-Q-Exa
notes: Initial 54 physical qubits; EuroHPC reports planned upgrade to 150 qubits by end of 2026.

name: SOL
notes: EuroQCS-Italy; neutral-atom quantum simulator integrated with Leonardo/CINECA.

name: EuroQCS-Spain
notes: Quantum annealer; EuroHPC lists systems of 10, 15 and 25 data qubits.
